name: inv4-partial-no-false-repaired
notes: Completeness gate. Baseline run A observes three reds (complete). Current run B enables bail:1, so t1 fails, bails, and t2/t3 record as not_run (partial). t2/t3 were red at baseline but are unobserved now: they MUST NOT be reported repaired/missing. Under partial comparability the verdict caps at inconclusive (no observed new_fail/updated_fail). observation_coverage exposes '1/3'. Note (finding): the spec does not fix how an observed red that was ALSO red at baseline (t1) is labelled under partial, since 'unchanged' is forbidden; this fixture does not assert t1's bucket.

steps.content:
import { defineConfig } from 'vitest/config'
export default defineConfig({ test: { bail: 1 } })
